## Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 bullets.

## Why This Change

Explain how this improves the deterministic local contract-testing story.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the repo positioned as an unofficial example
- [ ] I did not add unsupported claims about Foundry runtime behavior
- [ ] I updated handwritten tests for changed behavior
- [ ] I regenerated Themis coverage if needed
- [ ] I updated README or docs if the main customization path changed
- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run export:demo` if exported artifacts were affected

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out any contract, schema, adapter, or messaging changes that deserve extra attention.
